strengths.title: Effective needs discovery
strengths.evidence: Advisor asked about fitness goals, age, height, medical conditions, and previous attempts at weight loss.

strengths.title: Clear explanation of product benefits
strengths.evidence: Advisor explained the program's personalized workouts, nutrition guidance, and weekly coach follow-ups.

strengths.title: Professional and courteous closing
strengths.evidence: Advisor scheduled a free consultation and confirmed details politely, ending with 'Have a great day.'

improvements.title: Minor clarity in product description
improvements.suggestion: Clarify terms like 'customized type plan' to avoid confusion.

improvements.title: Confirm customer's availability earlier
improvements.suggestion: Ask if it's a good time to talk before diving into detailed questions to respect customer's time.

summary: The advisor conducted a professional and effective sales call by establishing rapport, thoroughly discovering customer needs, demonstrating product knowledge, qualifying budget, and closing by scheduling a free consultation. The customer responded positively throughout, and no compliance or professionalism issues were noted. Minor improvements could be made in product description clarity and initial time confirmation.
